commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a2caeab67457a7e1be1e68cc3bf773bf97d2dfa0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shouldRepair flag to session snapshot doctor health, rewrites stale path strings in sessions.json with backups, passes --fix plumbing, and adds a root standalone repro script.

PR surface: Source +73, Other +258. Total +331 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and the linked production report: current main and v2026.5.22 detect stale snapshot paths but do not pass shouldRepair into noteSessionSnapshotHealth or mutate sessions.json. I did not run the live command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the external real-behavior proof gate is unmet and the remaining blockers affect session-store correctness rather than a safe automated merge path.
